personal.bio: I'm an Applied AI Engineer based in Lebanon, working at the intersection of machine learning, scalable systems, and real-world impact. I build AI infrastructure, conduct research, write technical articles on Medium, and deliver workshops across universities and organisations. Published at IEEE, featured in L'Orient-Le Jour, and always chasing the next hard problem.
personal.siteDescription: Lynn El Moussaoui - AI engineer specializing in applied machine learning, knowledge systems, and scalable AI infrastructure. Explore projects in AI systems, MLOps, and research.

projects.title: Serverless AI CodeBase Auditor
projects.shortDescription: Serverless AI chatbot deployed on AWS using Lambda, API Gateway, Bedrock and S3 memory storage.

paragraphs: This project focuses on deploying AI systems using a fully serverless architecture.
The chatbot itself is intentionally simple, but the infrastructure demonstrates reproducible AI deployments using Infrastructure as Code.
bullets: Built a serverless AI chatbot architecture using AWS services.
Integrated Amazon Bedrock for LLM inference.
Automated deployments using GitHub Actions pipelines.

projects.title: AI Routing for Energy Internet
projects.shortDescription: Simulation of intelligent routing strategies for power packet networks using graph optimization and reinforcement learning.

paragraphs: This research project explores intelligent routing strategies for the Energy Internet, where electricity is transmitted in packetized form.
The system models energy routers as nodes in a graph and computes optimal paths based on loss minimization.
bullets: Designed a graph-based simulation of packetized power routing.
Modeled electrical loss using I²R formulas.
Explored AI-driven routing strategies including reinforcement learning.
Investigated decentralized consensus for secure routing.

blogs.title: Serverless AI in AWS
blogs.description: Overview of how I deployed a minimal AI tool on AWS using a serverless architecture, combining a Vercel frontend, API Gateway, Lambda backend, and Bedrock for LLM inference.

blogs.slug: MLOPS V2: the clean project guide
blogs.title: MLOPS V2: the clean project guide
blogs.description: Guide to turning messy machine learning notebook work into a clean project structure using Git, modular architecture, and uv for dependency management.

blogs.title: FAISS Similarity Search
blogs.description: Introduction to FAISS similarity search, covering embeddings, distance metrics, indexing strategies, and the basics of HNSW for efficient vector retrieval.

blogs.title: Async Embeddings in Python
blogs.description: Practical comparison of synchronous and asynchronous embedding calls in Python, showing how asyncio can speed up I/O-bound embedding pipelines.

blogs.title: MLOps 101: MLOps Made Easy
blogs.description: A practical introduction to MLOps concepts and workflows.

description: Designed an end-to-end machine learning pipeline for GDP temporal disaggregation, producing weekly economic estimates from quarterly official data.
Developed forecasting models using scikit-learn with time-aware cross-validation and hyperparameter tuning to prevent data leakage.
Built a FAISS-based semantic similarity system to normalize and deduplicate job skill titles across heterogeneous labor market datasets.
achievements: Enabled higher-frequency economic analysis for policy research through weekly GDP estimation.
Improved cross-source comparability of labor market datasets using semantic skill normalization.
Maintained production PowerBI dashboards on a monthly release cycle to support stakeholder reporting.

description: Promote awareness of Artificial Intelligence through workshops and technical sessions.
Deliver talks and educational workshops to students and professionals across universities and organizations.
achievements: Delivered AI workshops at Lebanese University, Saint Joseph University of Beirut, Multilane, and the Michel Daher Foundation.
Helped educate hundreds of students and professionals on AI, machine learning, and data science fundamentals.

description: Write technical articles on artificial intelligence, data science, and machine learning.
Explain complex AI concepts in accessible language for students and practitioners.
achievements: Published articles on MLOps, statistics, data science, and data drift in computer vision.
Built a technical writing portfolio focused on simplifying machine learning concepts.

description: Developed Optical Character Recognition (OCR) workflows using Python.

achievements: Improved OCR algorithm accuracy for document processing workflows.

description: Explored blockchain and cryptocurrency transaction networks.
Analyzed wallet structures and transaction patterns using clustering techniques.
achievements: Categorized cryptocurrency wallets based on transaction patterns.
Developed tagging strategies to identify wallet behaviors across blockchain networks.

description: Researched AI approaches for web-based object detection systems.

description: Managed supply chain coordination and supplier communication.
